items.title: Hartford Balanced Income Fund Q2 2025 Commentary
items.description: Global fixed-income markets posted positive total returns in Q2 2025, as measured by the Bloomberg Global Aggregate Index hedged to US dollars. Read more here.

items.title: It's Been The 'Summer of Stablecoins,' Goldman Says. Will Traditional Finance Be Upended?
items.description: The global stablecoins market stands to disrupt the traditional financial services industry, but to what degree remains an "open question," according to Goldman Sachs.

items.description: Financial stocks rose in Tuesday afternoon trading with the NYSE Financial Index and the Financial S

items.title: IPO & M&A Market Rebound: What it Means for Goldman's IB Business
items.description: GS is capitalizing on the rebound in global deal-making and IPOs, with IB fees rising and a strong pipeline fueling growth into 2025.

items.title: Goldman Sachs: This Is As Good As It Gets (Rating Downgrade)
items.description: Goldman Sachs delivered stellar Q2 results, with equity trading and investment banking revenues surging amid favorable market conditions. Learn more on GS stock here.
